notes: This shard uses Winter 2019 watermarked source PDFs, but the listed warnings are non-boundary subpart mark normalization issues.
All listed warning rows were verified against local PDF text extracted from WM_9709_w19_qp_63.pdf.
No listed warning changes the question boundary or blocks the shard.

review_reasons: The page-chain OCR omitted the printed '(iii)' label; local PDF text shows '(iii)' on page 9.
The raw mark list already contains the four printed mark allocations.
items.review_summary: q05 spans local text pages 8-9. Printed marks are [2] for (i), [1] for (ii), [2] for (iii), and [4] for (iv).

review_reasons: Printed part (i) is a container for nested parts (a) and (b); it has no separate mark allocation.
Local PDF text shows part (ii) continuing on the next page with the final [5] mark allocation.
items.review_summary: q07 spans local text pages 12-13. Printed marks are [3] for (i)(a), [2] for (i)(b), and [5] for (ii).
